title: UK Watchdog Imposes Reforms to Curb Rising Veterinary Costs - Bloomberg.com
summary_full: UK Watchdog Imposes Reforms to Curb Rising Veterinary Costs  Bloomberg.comVet prescription fees to be capped at £21  BBCUK vets face crackdown over fees as pet owners ‘left in the dark’ on bills  The GuardianCMA concludes market investigation with major reforms to veterinary sector  GOV.UKWatchdog imposes price caps on UK vets to boost competition  Financial Times
